steps.title: Interpret the input
steps.content:
The variable $x$ is the number of years after the end of $1954$. Therefore, $x=5$ means five years after the end of $1954$:
$$
1954+5=1959
$$
So the input refers to the end of $1959$.

steps.title: Interpret the output
steps.content: The function value gives the account value in dollars, not the increase or a multiplier. An output of approximately $297$ means the account is worth about $297$ at the identified year.

steps.title: Select the matching statement
steps.content: The matching statement gives an estimated account value of $297$ dollars at the end of $1959$. The answer is B.
